summary: Matched or improved multiple item callback functions across Ice Climbers ice, Mr. Game & Watch chef, Lugia, Ho-Oh, Goomba/Old Kuri, and Pikachu Thunder item files, with supporting header struct/prototype updates. PR body claims all functions verified 100% by objdiff and clean ninja, while the bot report records 15 new 100% matches plus two unmatched-item improvements below 100%, so verification evidence is useful but internally mixed.

key_files.role: Added Ice Climbers ice item-vars fields and a special-attributes struct used by the matched climbers ice animation callback.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itClimbersIce_ItemVars adds x4 and x8_b0; itClimbersIceAttributes adds x28

key_files.role: Refined Ho-Oh and Lugia attributes and Lugia item-vars layout to expose typed fields used by matched callbacks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itHououAttr adds x8/xC/x14; itLugiaAttributes x14 becomes s32; itLugia_ItemVars adds Vec3 x64

key_files.role: Implemented chef setup/collision callbacks and added required include.
evidence_refs: bot report: it_802C84A0 and itGamewatchchef_UnkMotion0_Coll to 100%; itGamewatchchef_UnkMotion1_Coll to 99.24%
raw_diff: function bodies added and it/it_266F.h included

key_files.role: Replaced an unknown prototype for it_802C84A0 with a typed signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: UNK_RET it_802C84A0(UNK_PARAMS) to void it_802C84A0(Item_GObj* gobj, s32 index)

key_files.role: Implemented Ho-Oh spawned, physics, effect/damage-related callbacks and added stage include.
evidence_refs: pr_body summary: it_2725_Logic18_Spawned, itHouou_UnkMotion2_Phys, it_802D2B4C, it_802D2C78
bot report: all four listed Ho-Oh functions to 100%
raw_diff: functions use Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset, efLib_PauseAll, efLib_ResumeAll

key_files.role: Replaced unknown Ho-Oh prototypes with typed void Item_GObj signatures.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802D2B4C and it_802D2D2C prototypes updated from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS

key_files.role: Implemented Lugia spawned, physics, and hitlag/effect callback functions and added stage include.
evidence_refs: bot report: all three Lugia functions to 100%

key_files.role: Implemented Goomba/Old Kuri initializer and several motion anim/coll callbacks.
evidence_refs: bot report: it_802D73F0, itOldkuri_UnkMotion2_Anim, itOldkuri_UnkMotion2_Coll, itOldkuri_UnkMotion9_Anim to 100%

key_files.role: Implemented Pikachu Thunder transition/setup functions and added placeholder include.
evidence_refs: bot report: it_802B211C to 100%; it_802B22B8 to 97.94%
raw_diff: function bodies added and <placeholder.h> included

what_changed: Replaced placeholder decomp markers with C implementations for item callback functions in six item source files.
Updated item headers to expose typed fields in item-vars and special-attributes structs used by the new function bodies.
Updated prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures for it_802C84A0, it_802D2B4C, and it_802D2D2C.
Added includes needed by new bodies: it/it_266F.h in itgamewatchchef.c, gr/stage.h in ithouou.c and itlugia.c, and placeholder.h in itpikachuthunder.c.
Bot report records matched-code progress of +2328 bytes and +0.06%, with 15 new 100% item matches and 4 improvements in unmatched items.

smart_moves.text: Recovered struct fields before using them in function bodies, e.g. itClimbersIce_ItemVars.x4/x8_b0, itClimbersIceAttributes.x28, itHououAttr.x8/xC/x14, and itLugia_ItemVars.x64.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCharItems.h and itCommonItems.h field additions
raw_diff: climbersice, houou, lugia bodies consume the new fields

smart_moves.text: Updated public prototypes when function bodies established signatures instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ithouou.h it_802D2B4C and it_802D2D2C signatures

smart_moves.text: Used existing item helpers and callbacks such as GET_ITEM, Item_80268E5C, it_80275158, it_80279CDC, efLib_PauseAll, and efLib_ResumeAll rather than adding new abstractions.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function bodies across item files

decomp_lessons.lesson: For item callback matching, recover narrow item-vars and article special-attributes fields in headers when the body repeatedly accesses the same offsets; this can replace raw offsets and make callback bodies reviewable.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: new callback bodies use these fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a decompiled item function establishes a concrete signature, update the owning item header prototype in the same PR rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
Verifier summaries can disagree with author claims; preserve both the PR body's claimed objdiff/ninja verification and the bot's per-symbol percentages when recording match status.
evidence_refs: pr_body: claims all functions verified 100% and ninja builds cleanly

naming_conventions.text: The PR keeps many address-style function names such as it_802C84A0, it_802D2B4C, it_802D73F0 when semantics are not promoted in the diff.
Local variables use short role names such as ip, attrs/attr, gobj, child, child_ip, and old_ip where item/object roles are clear.
Recovered fields remain mostly offset-style names such as x8, xC, x14, x64, xE50, xDD4_itemVar, and xDCC_flag rather than speculative semantic names.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK(8) was used narrowly in several newly implemented item callbacks.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: The PR body claims objdiff verification, but the bot report shows it_802B22B8 remained 97.94%, so not every PAD_STACK use is backed by a loaded 100% bot result.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Repeated GET_ITEM calls and scoped redeclarations were preserved in some callbacks, apparently to match local codegen.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itGamewatchchef_UnkMotion1_Coll reassigns ip and attrs
raw_diff: itOldkuri_UnkMotion2_Anim and Coll redeclare Item* ip
raw_diff: it_802D1DD8 and it_802D2C78 fetch item before and after it_80273454
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Intent is inferred only from diff shape and matching context, not from review discussion.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Stage_GetBlastZoneTopOffset was introduced for Lugia and Ho-Oh upward-flight physics checks.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: gr/stage.h include in itlugia.c and ithouou.c

follow_up_queries: item callback UNK_RET UNK_PARAMS header prototype update

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR #2300 merged, changed files, counts
raw_diff: complete diff excerpt for changed files
notes: No human review comments were loaded; review_feedback is empty.

PR title/body says 14 item functions and claims all functions verified 100% by objdiff, but the bot report lists 15 new 100% matches plus two additional improvements below 100%. Intake records this discrepancy instead of resolving it.
The PR body says ninja builds cleanly; no separate build log is loaded beyond that author claim.
The body is marked as generated with Claude Code and co-authored by Claude Opus 4.6, but no specific AI-generated choices can be attributed beyond the text itself.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Item callback matches often need header struct-field recovery
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2300 supports a lesson that item callback matching can require recovering item-vars and article special-attributes fields in shared item headers, then using those typed fields in the callback bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itCharItems.h and itCommonItems.h field additions
raw_diff: new item callback bodies use added fields

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update item header prototypes when body signatures are recovered
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2300 replaces UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS prototypes with typed signatures in item headers alongside matching function bodies.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_802D2B4C and it_802D2D2C prototype updates

source_update_candidates.title: Record verification discrepancies rather than flattening them
source_update_candidates.text: When a PR body claims all functions are 100% matched but bot output reports some functions as partial improvements, preserve both sources and avoid promoting a 100% match claim for those symbols without stronger evidence.
evidence_refs: pr_body: all functions verified 100% via objdiff
source_update_candidates.reason: This PR provides a concrete example where loaded verification evidence is internally inconsistent.

source_update_candidates.title: Item callback matching touches shared item headers for item-vars and attributes
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2300, item callback implementations under src/melee/it/items were paired with struct-field and prototype updates in src/melee/it/itCharItems.h, src/melee/it/itCommonItems.h, and item-specific headers.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help route future item-function decomp work to relevant shared headers.

rejection_notes: Do not record that all 14 listed functions were 100% matched as an accepted fact without reconciling the bot report, because loaded evidence shows at least two listed symbols below 100% in the bot report.
Do not infer reviewer intent or acceptance rationale; no review comments were loaded.
Do not generalize PAD_STACK as preferred style from this PR; it appears as a narrow matching tactic and loaded bot evidence is mixed for at least one PAD_STACK function.
